title: QA Finance Script 26 — curvature does NOT uniformly predict forward vol cross-asset; CONTRADICTS uniform predictability claim
_fixture_purpose: PASS fixture: canonical CONTRADICTS result. Pre-declared criteria were OOS R²>0.01 on ≥3/4 assets AND DM p<0.10 on ≥2/4 assets. Script 26 results FAIL both. ETH-USD is a genuine single-asset exception (OOS R²=+0.024***, DM p=0.001) but this does not satisfy the cross-asset criteria. The cert itself PASSes — the contradiction is correctly documented with evidence and fail_ledger. This demonstrates honest negative result certification.

observation.summary: HAR+kappa_dw vs HAR OOS R² and Diebold-Mariano tests across SPY, BTC-USD, ETH-USD, GLD. Pre-declared criteria FAIL at h=5d (R²>0.01 on 0/4, DM p<0.10 on 1/4) and h=21d (0/4, 0/4). SPY VIX achieves R²=+0.042 — far better than QA curvature for equities. One genuine exception: ETH-USD h=1d R²=+0.024***, h=5d R²=+0.010** — but single-asset, needs separate validation.

parent_cert.claim: QA orbit curvature (kappa) is a structurally predictive signal for forward volatility across multiple asset classes — i.e., the curvature metric derived from QA state dynamics carries information beyond classical HAR model residuals

evidence.description: OOS R² improvement of HAR+kappa_dw over HAR baseline at h=5d: 0/4 assets clear threshold of +0.01
evidence.value: SPY R²=-0.004, BTC R²=0.000, ETH R²=+0.010, GLD R²=+0.001

evidence.description: Diebold-Mariano test at h=5d: 1/4 assets significant at p<0.10 — fails required count of 2
evidence.value: only ETH significant; SPY/BTC/GLD not significant

evidence.description: SPY VIX achieves R²=+0.042, DM p=0.035** vs SPY QA curvature near zero — for equities, realized vol implied vol is far better than geometric curvature
evidence.value: VIX R²=+0.042 vs curvature R²=-0.004 on SPY

evidence.description: ETH single-asset exception (R²=+0.024*** at h=1d) is genuine and worth separate validation, but does not satisfy pre-declared cross-asset criteria
evidence.value: ETH in-sample kappa coefficient t=+3.61, p=0.0003

validation_checks.description: observation.source is a known source type
verdict is one of {CONSISTENT, CONTRADICTS, PARTIAL, INCONCLUSIVE}

fail_ledger.details: Pre-declared criteria (OOS R²>0.01 on ≥3/4 assets AND DM p<0.10 on ≥2/4 assets) not met at any horizon. Curvature does not uniformly predict forward vol cross-asset. ETH exception noted but insufficient alone.
fail_ledger.invariant_diff: claimed: kappa predicts vol cross-asset; observed: fails on SPY, BTC, GLD; single-asset exception ETH at short horizon only
